delete.dialogConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete the mode-change rules?

description:
On this page, the rules for switching the mode of data collection are described for complex survey protocols where interviewers take over from an online collection.

These rules are specified at the questionnaire level and/or at the roundabout occurrences.

error.formulaNotVtl: Mode-change rules are available only to questionnaires using VTL.

form.noRoundaboutVariables: Rule cannot be specified if there is no roundabout, or no variables associated to the roundabout.

howToUse: These rules may be specified in VTL from collected data to determinate when the survey collect method must be made by an interviewer. They can be specified on survey-level and/or on roundabout level.
new: Specify mode-change rules for the questionnaire
noQuestionnaireRule: There is no rule at the questionnaire level.
noLeafRule: There is no rule at the roundabout level.
title: Mode-change rules
versionNoMultimode: Mode-change rules have not been specified in this version.
